settings.cellContentFunction: let color = '#757575'; let backColor = '#F5F5F5'; let text = value; if (value === 'running') { color = '#E8F5E9'; backColor = '#2E7D32'; text = 'Running'; } else if (value === 'stopped') { color = '#757575'; backColor = '#E0E0E0'; text = 'Stopped'; } else if (value === 'fault') { color = '#FFEBEE'; backColor = '#D32F2F'; text = 'Fault'; } return `${text}`;
